channel.title: Title on Kiarash Azarnia
channel.description: Recent content in Title on Kiarash Azarnia

item.title: Sample Title
item.description:
This is a sample post.

This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Contact
item.description: I always welcome new friends. My social links are available in the sidebar.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi there! I am Kiarash and this is my personal blog.
